CustomField.formula: BLANKVALUE(Other_Housing_Expenses__c,0) + BLANKVALUE(Other_Personal_Expenses__c,0) + BLANKVALUE(Other_Medical_Expenses__c,0) + BLANKVALUE(Other_Living_Expenses__c,0) + BLANKVALUE(Other_TransportationExpenses__c,0) + BLANKVALUE(Other_Insurance_Expenses__c,0) + BLANKVALUE(Other_Payments__c,0)
CustomField.label: Other Expenses
